docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,102.82 FILED BY LEE DAISY AS TO DEFENDANT BREUNERS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-05-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEE DAISY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BREUNERS $1,102.82 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,110.82, IN ADDITION TO HER DAMAGES OF $1102.82, PLAINTIFF IS ENTITLED TO THE REFUND OF HER PAYMENTS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BREUNERS
INVALID SERVICE AS TO BREUNERS, NOT ENOUGH DESCRIP TION OF PARTY SERVED, NO MAILING DONE.
